<!--
TITLE RULES (please edit the PR title before creating):
- Start with `feat:` (new feature, bumps MINOR) or `fix:` (bug/patch, bumps PATCH)
- Include the stage number, e.g. `stage 2`
Examples:
  feat(stage 5): add drift monitor to pause on variance spikes
  fix(stage 2): correct 1m candle open/close on minute boundary rollover
-->

## Summary
(1–3 lines: what changed, why now)

## Cause
<!-- one of: incident | kpi | feature-request | refactor | dependency | config -->
Cause: feature-request

## Stage
<!-- put the primary stage number impacted: 0–9 -->
Stage: 1

## Evidence & Impact
- Sheet: <link to relevant tab or filtered view>
- Logs: <ops_log / health links>
- KPIs before/after: <brief numbers if relevant>

## Acceptance Gates Touched
- [ ] Stage N criterion: <paste the criterion you satisfied>

## Links
Refs PM-<id> (or) Fixes #<issue-number>

## Checklist
- [ ] PR title starts with `feat:` or `fix:` and includes `stage N`
- [ ] I added the one-line **Cause:** above (exact format)
- [ ] Evidence links added (Sheet/logs)
